## What does this PR do?


## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New provider (`providers/`)
- [ ] New storage backend (`storage/`)
- [ ] New slide splitter (`slide-splitters/`)
- [ ] New feature module (`modules/`)
- [ ] Core change (please explain why it needs to be core, not a plugin)
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist
- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] If this touches credentials/auth of any kind, I've kept secrets out of `config.json` and documented any new `.env` variables in `.env.example`
- [ ] I didn't add any telemetry/analytics/phone-home
- [ ] Lint passes
